Ram: 16GB DDR3

WHAT WILL COME IN THE BUNDLE:

  1. Gaming PC x1
  2. Gaming Keyboard and Mouse x1

  4. VGA monitor lead x1
  5. Refurbished 19" Monitor x1.

Software:

Adobe Acrobat Reader DC - The leading PDF Viewer for reliably viewing, printing, signing and commenting on PDF documents. 

AnyDesk - A remote desktop support application that ensures secure and reliable remote desktop connections for our customer support where you may need it. Please note: You will need to generate and provide an ID for our customer support team to make a connection; this application does not allow us to connect without your consent. 

BullGuard Anti-Virus Premium internet security with Game Booster - BullGuard Internet Security delivers complete protection for your devices. BullGuard's Game Booster optimizes online games with an anti-cheat engine and even improves your video-streaming. It's the Internet Security for the gamers, and why we have installed a complimentary 90 day license on your new machine. 

CCleaner - Optimize, clean, protect and inject instant speed into your machine by removing the unnecessary files taking up room on your hard drive. Clear out errors and broken settings to improve stability. Boost your browser and help protect your privacy by securely erasing tracking cookies and history. Google Chrome - A safe, speedy and secure web browser to suit all your web browsing needs.

WARRANTY & CONDITION:

“Our gaming PCs are made USING BRAND NEW COMPONENTS EXCLUDING THE MOTHERBOARD AND CPU and come pre-installed with a Genuine Windows 10 64-Bit license. This item is built/tested/cleaned on-site by our team of highly skilled engineers and fully functional as intended. All Gaming PC's will come with 12 months warranty with a Computer Specialist.”

PLEASE NOTE:

  • No Games are included or installed on the system 
  • Please ensure that you have checked that the computer is suitable to play the games you want, as Computer Specialist will not be held liable. If you are unsure, Please message us the Game you wish to play and the specifications copied into the message and we will cross check for you. 
  • PRODUCT DOES NOT HAVE INTERNAL SPEAKERS
  • USB 3.0 DOES NOT WORK AS MOTHERBOARD SUPPORTS USB 2.0
  • Only expect the performance on a level to the components themsleves.
  • Free WiFi Dongle provided to enable WiFi onto the computer. Please note if streaming or gaming online we recommend upgrading the dongle or connecting by Ethernet cable.
  • Monitor: Brand will vary on stock
  • Monitor Type - Sqaure or Wide screen (DEPEND ON STOCK)
  • Monitor Colour -Black, Silver, Grey,
  • Monitor Condition - Grade A - Refurbished.

Features

  • Processor: Intel i5
  • RAM: 16GB
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce
  • SSD/HDD: HDD
  • Total Storage: 1001-2000GB
  • Keywords: Gaming

Description & Details

Summary

  • Intel Core i5 2nd Gen
  • 2TB SATA Hard Drive
  • 4GB NVIDIA GTX 1650
  • 8GB DDR3 RAM
  • 19" Refurbished Monitor

Refurbished (Intel i5 2nd Gen, 8GB DDR 3) ULTRA FAST i3 i5 i7 Desktop Gaming PC 2TB 16GB NVIDIA GTX 1650 Description

Operating System: Windows 10 64-Bit

Processor: Intel Core i5 2nd Gen

Ram: 8GB DDR3

Hard Drive: 2TB SATA Hard Drive

Optical Drive: Not Included

Graphics Card: 4GB NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1650

Graphic Card Ports: HDMI, DVI, Display Port

Screen: 19'' Refurbished TFT (Brand and Model Will Vary)

Keyboard & Mouse: Included

Case: CiT FLASH RGB

WIFI: USB Wi-Fi

Power Supply: 600W Standard Power Supply


 

WHAT WILL COME IN THE BUNDLE:

  1. Gaming PC x1
  2. Gaming Keyboard and Mouse x1
  3. Power lead x2
  4. VGA monitor lead x1
  5. Refurbished 19" Monitor x1.

Software:

Adobe Acrobat Reader DC - The leading PDF Viewer for reliably viewing, printing, signing and commenting on PDF documents. 

AnyDesk - A remote desktop support application that ensures secure and reliable remote desktop connections for our customer support where you may need it. Please note: You will need to generate and provide an ID for our customer support team to make a connection; this application does not allow us to connect without your consent. 

BullGuard Anti-Virus Premium internet security with Game Booster - BullGuard Internet Security delivers complete protection for your devices. BullGuard's Game Booster optimizes online games with an anti-cheat engine and even improves your video-streaming. It's the Internet Security for the gamers, and why we have installed a complimentary 90 day license on your new machine. 

CCleaner - Optimize, clean, protect and inject instant speed into your machine by removing the unnecessary files taking up room on your hard drive. Clear out errors and broken settings to improve stability. Boost your browser and help protect your privacy by securely erasing tracking cookies and history. Google Chrome - A safe, speedy and secure web browser to suit all your web browsing needs.

WARRANTY & CONDITION:

“Our gaming PCs are made USING BRAND NEW COMPONENTS EXCLUDING THE MOTHERBOARD AND CPU and come pre-installed with a Genuine Windows 10 64-Bit license. This item is built/tested/cleaned on-site by our team of highly skilled engineers and fully functional as intended. All Gaming PC's will come with 12 months warranty with a Computer Specialist.”

PLEASE NOTE:

  • No Games are included or installed on the system 
  • Please ensure that you have checked that the computer is suitable to play the games you want, as Computer Specialist will not be held liable. If you are unsure, Please message us the Game you wish to play and the specifications copied into the message and we will cross check for you. 
  • PRODUCT DOES NOT HAVE INTERNAL SPEAKERS
  • USB 3.0 DOES NOT WORK AS MOTHERBOARD SUPPORTS USB 2.0
  • Only expect the performance on a level to the components themsleves.
  • Free WiFi Dongle provided to enable WiFi onto the computer. Please note if streaming or gaming online we recommend upgrading the dongle or connecting by Ethernet cable.
  • Monitor: Brand will vary on stock
  • Monitor Type - Sqaure or Wide screen (DEPEND ON STOCK)
  • Monitor Colour -Black, Silver, Grey,
  • Monitor Condition - Grade A - Refurbished.

Features

  • Processor: Intel i5
  • RAM: 8GB
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce
  • SSD/HDD: HDD
  • Total Storage: 1001-2000GB
  • Keywords: Gaming

title: 360 Photo Video booth 80cm Rotating Selfie Spinner Wedding LED Ring Light
content:
Description & Details

360 Photo Video booth 80cm Rotating Selfie Spinner Wedding LED Ring Light Description

Capture memorable moments from every angle with this immersive 360 photo booth. The perfect addition for any birthday, wedding, festival, or corporate event to create a unique experience that is sure to take your events business to the next level.

With a massive 80cm platform and a weight capacity of up to 400kg, there is plenty of space for up to 4 people to get involved in the fun. Four different sticker designs give you the flexibility to really make this photobooth your own and being removable means you can tailor it to the appropriate aesthetic of each event.

Remote control operated; guests can capture the entire experience with the click of a button. Compatible with a range of different devices including phones, tablets, DSLR cameras and GoPro's - each with their own unique attachment included - this photo booth is super versatile. Able to customise the speed, direction or turn the machine on or off, this remote also allows each user to tailor their experience. The arm can be adjusted between 40cm and 155cm and at an angle of 36 to 156 degrees, ideal for capturing a range of video content from products to people of all heights.

An RGB LED ring light ensures the lighting is always on point to capture high quality content every time. With 3 white shades, 12 dimmable settings and 40 RGB light settings to choose from - all interchangeable through a remote control - you can easily adapt it to suit the surroundings. This can be matched to the LED strip lights around the base to create a mesmerising feature that is sure to be the star of any event.

A pre-fitted rechargeable battery gives this photo booth the complete flexibility to be moved about and used in various locations. Lasting for up to an incredible 6 hours it can provide heaps of entertainment long into the night. But if you really don't want the fun to end it can also be plugged into the mains for a constant power supply.

We have included a money gun complete with paper money and additional photo props, making this the full party package.

Safety is always at the forefront of all our products and with the emergency stop pedal, this 360 photo booth is no exception.

Travelling between events is made easy with the hardwearing flight case which can compactly store all components and accessories. Attached wheels make it effortless to manoeuvre and the included fixing kit allows you to quickly assemble the photobooth upon arrival.

What are you waiting for, get your event off to a spin with this versatile 360 photo booth!

  • Huge 80cm platform size
  • Adjustable arm with a maximum height of 215cm
  • RGB LED Ring light with an incredible 40+ settings
  • Battery or mains powered
  • FREE flight case, money gun & fixing kit

title: 360 Photo Video booth 80cm Rotating Selfie Spinner Wedding LED Ring Light
content:
Description & Details

360 Photo Video booth 80cm Rotating Selfie Spinner Wedding LED Ring Light Description

Capture memorable moments from every angle with this immersive 360 photo booth. The perfect addition for any birthday, wedding, festival, or corporate event to create a unique experience that is sure to take your events business to the next level.

With a massive 80cm platform and a weight capacity of up to 400kg, there is plenty of space for up to 4 people to get involved in the fun. Four different sticker designs give you the flexibility to really make this photobooth your own and being removable means you can tailor it to the appropriate aesthetic of each event.

Remote control operated; guests can capture the entire experience with the click of a button. Compatible with a range of different devices including phones, tablets, DSLR cameras and GoPro's - each with their own unique attachment included - this photo booth is super versatile. Able to customise the speed, direction or turn the machine on or off, this remote also allows each user to tailor their experience. The arm can be adjusted between 40cm and 155cm and at an angle of 36 to 156 degrees, ideal for capturing a range of video content from products to people of all heights.

An RGB LED ring light ensures the lighting is always on point to capture high quality content every time. With 3 white shades, 12 dimmable settings and 40 RGB light settings to choose from - all interchangeable through a remote control - you can easily adapt it to suit the surroundings. This can be matched to the LED strip lights around the base to create a mesmerising feature that is sure to be the star of any event.

A pre-fitted rechargeable battery gives this photo booth the complete flexibility to be moved about and used in various locations. Lasting for up to an incredible 6 hours it can provide heaps of entertainment long into the night. But if you really don't want the fun to end it can also be plugged into the mains for a constant power supply.

We have included a money gun complete with paper money and additional photo props, making this the full party package.

Safety is always at the forefront of all our products and with the emergency stop pedal, this 360 photo booth is no exception.

Travelling between events is made easy with the hardwearing flight case which can compactly store all components and accessories. Attached wheels make it effortless to manoeuvre and the included fixing kit allows you to quickly assemble the photobooth upon arrival.

What are you waiting for, get your event off to a spin with this versatile 360 photo booth!

Product Features:

  • Huge 80cm platform size
  • Adjustable arm with a maximum height of 215cm
  • RGB LED Ring light with an incredible 40+ settings
  • Battery or mains powered
  • FREE flight case, money gun & fixing kit

(Phantom Black) Samsung Galaxy S21 Ultra 5G Dual Sim | 256GB | 12GB RAM Description

Manufacturer's description:

Get Samsung's most powerful phone yet, now with ultra-fast 5G connectivity.  The Samsung Galaxy S21 Ultra 5G introduces a bold new camera design in a category of its own. It's ultra-sized with a contour-cut camera that seamlessly houses cutting-edge lenses. 8K Video is the highest resolution video available in a Galaxy smartphone - that's four times as many pixels as 4K. Record in 8K 24fps and get crisp footage that looks better than the cinema, then upload and watch right on YouTube. And with 8K Video Snap, you can pull an album of epic high-resolution photos straight from 8K video. So you don't have to choose between shooting video or stills.

Galaxy's first 5nm processor packs epic power and speed. This outstanding upgrade means faster processing and more intelligence in every aspect of Galaxy S21 Ultra 5G. Up to 16GB of RAM, a 20% quicker CPU, a GPU that's 35% faster and up to 2x faster AI processing means this Galaxy phone runs at lightspeed.  Despite the speed, the Galaxy S21 Ultra 5G has relentless endurance. Galaxy S21 Ultra 5G's Intelligent Battery outlasts the day — even on 5G. Maxing out at a massive 5000mAh, it combines with the new power-efficient display and processor to live on beyond the 24-hour mark

The Knox security platform delivers a high level of security, protecting your phone from the chip up and giving you more confidence in your data and app permissions. It also features Samsung Knox Vault to keep your biometric authentication data under wraps. And the larger Ultrasonic Fingerprint sensor improves latency and dry finger recognition for fast, accurate unlocking. Plus, IP68 rated water resistance and ultra-tough Gorilla Glass Victus protects it from physical threats.

LEGO 41615 Brickheadz Harry Potter and Hedwig Description


LEGO 41615 Brickheadz Harry Potter and Hedwig

  • LEGO, the LEGO logo, the , DUPLO, LEGENDS OF CHIMA, NINJAGO, BIONICLE, MINDSTORMS and MIXELS are trademarks and copyrights of the LEGO Group.
  • 2029 The LEGO Group. All rights reserved.
  • Enjoy imaginative play with this inspirational LEGO set.



Build LEGO BrickHeadz Harry Potter and Hedwig from the original movie Harry Potter and The Sorcerer s Stone, with this fun set. Check out Harry Potter s iconic details, including his lightning scar, signature round spectacles, Gryffindor scarf and black cape with the Gryffindor emblem, magic wand, plus his pet owl Hedwig. Display the young wizard on the baseplate next to his faithful feathered friend for all your Muggle friends to see. The set includes buildable Harry Potter and Hedwig LEGO BrickHeadz construction characters featuring decorated eyes and authentic details from the original movie, including Harry s round black spectacles and a magic wand. Each LEGO BrickHeadz construction character comes with its own buildable collector's baseplate so have fun growing your LEGO BrickHeadz collection with other characters from the original movie. Young Harry Potter stands over 2 Inch (7 cm) tall without baseplate.

This LEGO Friends Heartlake City School construction toy for kids aged 8+ years old features classrooms, a canteen, an outdoor area and accessories This classroom theme modular school building toy consists of removable sections that kids can build and rearrange however they like This playset includes LEGO Friends mini-dolls Aliya, Olly, Autumn, Ms. Malu Hale, Niko, plus Bunsen the pet hamster and cool dolls accessories Kids can get creative in the art room, relax in the canteen, hang out in the outdoor area and go out to skateboard, ride a bike or play basketball Meet the 2023 series of Heartlake City characters, each with their own unique personalities and passions, to inspire more role-play adventures This LEGO Friends high school toy makes a great gift idea or any-time treat for kids aged 8+ who love LEGO Friends and creative storytelling

title: LEGO 43206 Disney Princess Cinderella and Prince Charming's Castle Doll House, Buildable Toy with 3 Mini Dolls, plus Gus Gus and Lucifer Figures
content:
Description & Details

LEGO 43206 Disney Princess Cinderella and Prince Charming's Castle Doll House, Buildable Toy with 3 Mini Dolls, plus Gus Gus and Lucifer Figures Description

Castle builders or Disney Princess fans get loads of play possibilities with this LEGO ? Disney Princess Cinderella and Prince Charming's Castle (43206) buildable toy set. This toy for kids 5+ years old lets children dance with destiny and relive favourite movie scenes or create their own stories. This Cinderella buildable toy features a 3-level castle dolls house. There is a ballroom with a spinning dance floor, a dress studio where kids can swap out Cinderella's dress, a closet with a working cat door and more. The princess set also includes Cinderella with an extra ball gown outfit, Prince Charming and Lady Tremaine mini-doll figures, plus Gus Gus & Lucifer LEGO animal figures and lots of cool accessories. With detailed mini-doll figures and a recognisable build, this LEGO Disney Princess castle dolls house set encourages open creative play that helps build vital life skills through fun and includes interactive digital instructions to make building extra fun. Available in the free LEGO Building Instructions app, the intuitive tools help kids visualise the model as they build. The set makes an impressive gift for any Disney fan. With the castle measuring over 11 in. (28 cm) high, 9.5 in (25 cm) wide and 4.5 in. (11 cm) deep, this set is made for endless play sessions and can be displayed in kids' rooms Contains 365 pieces.
